column1: Smoking isn't allowed in the airport. You ______ smoke in the airport.
It's not necessary to come to the train station to meet me. You _____ meet her at the train station.
We were forced to wait for over two hours in the rain! They _____ wait for over two hours in the rain.
The instructions tell you to write in pencil. You _____ write in pencil.
You can contact us by either phone or email. You _____ phone them.
In my country, you can carry your passport with you if you want, but it's not necessary. In her country, you _____ carry your passport with you.
My grandfather was made to start work when he was just fourteen years old. He ____- start work when he was just fourteen years old.
It's not necessary to book a hotel; you can stay in our spare room. You ______ stay in a hotel.
